narrative:
North Olmsted-01-C (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,179 registered voters, with 56.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.9%, a clear Democratic lean of 6.3 percentage points.
